hard corals photo index Phylum Cnidaria > Class Anthozoa > Subclass Zoantharia/Hexacorallia Hard corals on Singapore shores Don’t know the name of the hard coral? Try the hard coral photo index

Pseudosiderastrea tayamai
Neat hexa coral                                                                                                         Family Psammocoridae

Psammocora sp. Boulder sandpaper coral

lab

snt

tkr

kus

laz

sji

jng

hnt

tpg

smk

tsm

rfl

lfa

Psammcora sp.
Crinkled sandpaper coral                                                       in red are those listed among the threatened animals of Singapore from Davison, G.W. H. and P. K. L. Ng and Ho Hua Chew, 2008. The Singapore Red Data Book: Threatened plants and animals of Singapore.

Northern shores

**pgl:** punggol & coney island, prp: pasir ris park, chg: changi, cj: chek jawa and pulau ubin, skd: pulau sekudu, bb: beting bronok, tus: tuas, ecp: east coast park, tm: tanah merah

Southern shores

lab: labrador + berlayar creek, snt: sentosa, cyr: cyrene reef, kus: kusu island, laz: lazarus island, sji: st. john’s island, sis: sisters islands, jng: pulau jong, tkr:pulau tekukor, hnt: pulau hantu, tpg: terumbus pempang darat, tengah and laut, smk: pulau semakau, tsm: submerged reefs off semakau - terumbu raya, beting bemban besar, terumbu bemban, terumbu semakau, rfl: raffles lighthouse, lfa: live firing area (Salu, Sudong, Pawai, Senang, Biola and submerged reefs in the area)
